title: nepeta austriaca
intro: Nepeta austriaca, also known as Austrian catmint, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nepeta austriaca include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to soothe respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Nepeta austriaca include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
